headline: OGE Advances Clean Energy and Grid Modernization to Drive Growth
summary: OGE Energy ramps up renewables and plans $7.29B in grid upgrades through 2030, but rising fuel costs and supply-chain woes pose challenges.

headline: Buy 5 Low-Beta High-Yielding Stocks Amid Global Economic Uncertainty
summary: HSY, BHP, RIO, ATO and ETR are low-beta dividend stocks that offer steady income and downside cushion as 2026 market volatility tests investors' nerves.
